description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that runs on push to the master branch for a specific repository owner. The workflow checks out the code, sets up .NET Core 3.1.300 and Node.js 10.x, runs tests and generates a coverage report, publishes documentation, deploys to GitHub Pages and GitHub.io, packages and publishes a nightly NuGet package, and syncs the repository to Gitee.
